roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:60 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  16  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:FRANKLIN WILL REMAININ CUSTODY UNTIL JULY 15, 2014, HE MAY SERVE THE REST OF HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM, CLIENT MUST COMPLETE  60   DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT THROUGH HEALTHRIGHT 360, HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT, A BED WILL BE AVAILABLE ON JULY 15, 2014, THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMED BY MICHAEL DAVILA OF HEALTHRIGHT 360, ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TO MODIFY TREATMENT, CHANGE THE TREATMENT PROGRAM, SEND PAROLEE INTO A DETOX FACILITY IN THE EVENT OF A RELAPSE AND IMPLEMENT ANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASURE AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE  60   DAYS OFTREATMENT,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:06-18-14 /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TOPAROLE UPONRELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
